Make sure to comply the following rules:
1. Do not add parentheses to the if-else conditions.
2. Do not add any comments in generated code unless specifically requested to do so.
3. Do not check if a types.string property value is null. Only check if ValueString is empty.
4. Do not check if the returned value is null before refreshing a computed property.
5. Do not generate a Full Changelog in the release note.
6. Do not include any JIRA ID or link in the release note. Only include GitHub issue ID if it is mentioned in the description above.
